implemented: Screenshot capture via chrome.tabs.captureVisibleTab()
Screenshot preview in extension panel
Vision analysis prompt templates and send-to-proxy flow
Action planner with step approval UI
Label-based click with fuzzy scoring
Coordinate-based left/right/double-click via document.elementFromPoint()
Type into React inputs using native value setter
Type into Monaco contenteditable DAX editor
Keyboard shortcut dispatch with modifier keys
Page scroll by direction and amount
Right-click and double-click via MouseEvent dispatch
DOM scanner for interactive elements (all and Power BI only modes)
Per-row click buttons in DOM scanner results
Action log with timestamp, type, target, result (60 entries)
Power BI shortcuts: Format pane, Fields list, New measure, Save measure, Refresh, Select all
Deterministic skill engine with 9 skills and 107 rules
DAX measure generator with 16 patterns
DAX reviewer with rule-based pattern matching
Visual recommender and report page designer
Model reviewer and relationship checklist
Training knowledge base in chrome.storage.local
Anthropic API fallback via configurable proxy endpoint
Wait action in action plan steps
Screenshot before/after in action plan execution
Approval mode for individual action plan steps

partially_implemented.status: Partially implemented via fixed wait_ms in action plan steps
partially_implemented.gap: No automatic MutationObserver watching for Power BI spinner elements — fixed delays may be too short or too long

partially_implemented.status: Vision AI can detect errors from screenshots
partially_implemented.gap: No automatic DOM polling for [class*='visual-error'] or [aria-label*='Something went wrong'] before proceeding with next step

partially_implemented.status: Individual buttons exist for New measure, Type, Save
partially_implemented.gap: No single 'Deploy DAX' button that chains all steps with proper waits and verification

partially_implemented.status: Drag action included in automation skill schema
partially_implemented.gap: Not implemented in contentScript.js executor — left_mouse_down + mousemove + left_mouse_up sequence not coded

partially_implemented.status: Generic click can click page tabs if label matches exactly
partially_implemented.gap: No dedicated page list UI in panel, no auto-discovery of available pages

partially_implemented.status: Vision AI can analyze selected visual from screenshot
partially_implemented.gap: No DOM-based extraction of selected visual's field wells without screenshot

partially_implemented.status: Vision AI prompt exists for field well detection
partially_implemented.gap: No DOM-based field well reader; depends entirely on screenshot + vision

missing_priority_1.description: No proxy exists in the repo. Vision AI and action planner silently fail without it. Extension posts to localhost:8787/fallback with no server running.
missing_priority_1.impact: All AI-powered Act tab features are non-functional without a proxy
missing_priority_1.build_effort: 2-4 hours: Node/Cloudflare Worker that receives extension JSON, calls Anthropic API with image blocks for vision requests, returns {text: string}

missing_priority_1.description: MutationObserver watching for Power BI spinner elements. Expose waitForStable() function that action plan executor calls between every step.
missing_priority_1.impact: Without this, action plans fail on slow reports — steps fire before previous action has rendered

missing_priority_1.description: Implement left_mouse_down + mousemove sequence + left_mouse_up in contentScript.js to enable drag operations for moving/resizing visuals and dragging fields into wells
missing_priority_1.impact: Cannot automate field-to-well assignment or visual repositioning without drag

missing_priority_1.description: Chained workflow button: New measure click → wait for editor → select all → type DAX → screenshot to verify → user approves → save → wait → screenshot to confirm
missing_priority_1.impact: The most common use case requires 8 separate manual steps across two tabs

missing_priority_1.description: Before any model-modifying action, capture screenshot + current DOM state. After action, allow rollback by re-opening editor and restoring previous DAX from state.lastDeployedDax
missing_priority_1.impact: No recovery path if a deployed measure breaks a visual

missing_priority_2.description: Auto-discover page tabs from the DOM, show list in Act tab, one-click page switching
missing_priority_2.impact: Users must manually click page tabs or know exact tab label for generic click

missing_priority_2.description: Automatic DOM poll for error selectors before and after each action plan step. Abort and report if an error state appears.
missing_priority_2.impact: Action plans proceed even when a visual breaks mid-sequence

missing_priority_2.description: Scan [class*='fieldWell'] and [class*='bucket'] elements to extract field names without a screenshot. More reliable and faster than vision.
missing_priority_2.impact: Field well reading requires vision AI call today, adds latency and proxy dependency

missing_priority_2.description: Save actLog to chrome.storage.local. Persist last action plan. Persist last deployed DAX.
missing_priority_2.impact: Page refresh wipes the action log and plan — no audit trail

missing_priority_2.description: Add 'notifications' permission to manifest. Fire chrome.notifications.create() when action plan completes or errors.
missing_priority_2.impact: Users must watch the panel during long action plan execution

missing_priority_2.description: Scan [class*='slicer'] and [class*='filter-card'] to read active filter values without a screenshot
missing_priority_2.impact: Filter context detection relies on vision AI, adds latency

missing_priority_3.description: Proxy endpoints to list workspaces, reports, and datasets using Power BI REST API with OAuth token
missing_priority_3.impact: Cannot enumerate reports or navigate to a workspace without user manually browsing

missing_priority_3.description: Write measures directly to the semantic model using XMLA endpoint or TMDL via REST API, bypassing the UI entirely
missing_priority_3.impact: UI-based measure creation is fragile; XMLA is the production-grade approach
missing_priority_3.build_effort: 16-24 hours including auth, error handling, and rollback

missing_priority_3.description: Run a DAX EVALUATE query against the semantic model via XMLA or Analyze in Excel endpoint to validate measure results before deployment
missing_priority_3.impact: Cannot verify measure correctness without opening DAX Studio externally

missing_priority_3.description: Before/after screenshots, DAX before/after diff, timestamp, and author stored per deployment in chrome.storage.local or a backend
missing_priority_3.impact: No audit trail for measure changes made through the extension

risks.risk: Power BI Web DOM selectors change with product updates
risks.mitigation: Use aria-label and role selectors instead of class names. Maintain a selector fallback list per action. Add automated selector validation tests.

risks.risk: Vision AI returns hallucinated field names or incorrect visual type
risks.mitigation: Cross-reference vision output with DOM-based element scan. Always require user approval before acting on vision-derived action plans.

risks.risk: Action plan executing without user reviewing each step
risks.mitigation: Every step that modifies the model has requires_approval true. Run-all only executes approved steps. Screenshot before and after every model change.

risks.risk: Proxy endpoint storing or logging sensitive report data
risks.mitigation: Proxy should be user-hosted. Screenshots sent to proxy contain report data and should never be logged to disk or third-party services.

risks.risk: RLS bypass if ALL(FactTable) is deployed without review
risks.mitigation: Rules adv-perf-038 and adv-model-075 flag these patterns with fix_type needs_review and requires_user_approval true in the fallback contract.

risks.risk: contentScript.js grows too large for a single file
risks.mitigation: Split into contentScript.js (UI + event binding), actExecutor.js (action execution), and actPlanner.js (vision + planner calls). Load all in manifest content_scripts.

recommended_build_order: 1. Build and deploy the proxy server — without it, 80% of Act tab features are non-functional
2. Implement waitForStable() with MutationObserver for loading detection
3. Implement the Deploy DAX single-button workflow
4. Implement drag-and-drop action executor (mousedown + mousemove + mouseup)
5. Add cross-session persistence for actLog and last plan to chrome.storage.local
6. Add browser notifications permission and completion alerts
7. Implement report page navigator in the Act tab
10. Implement Power BI REST API workspace/report enumeration in the proxy
